question_text: Which of the following is the BEST way to reduce wasted energy in a home?

options.label: A
options.text: Leaving doors and windows open in winter

options.label: B
options.text: Adding loft insulation and cavity wall insulation to reduce heat loss

options.label: C
options.text: Using older appliances instead of new ones

options.label: D
options.text: Turning heating on full and opening windows to cool down

explanation: Thermal insulators like loft and cavity wall insulation trap heat inside homes, preventing it from escaping through walls and roofs. This reduces the energy wasted to the surroundings and lowers heating bills. Options A, C, and D all waste energy rather than reduce it.
